_authoring_notes: Phase 4a-hub Section 1: Memberships hub HERO. Original revised 2026-04-28 EOD per Jonathan's hub-rebalancing direction; copy revised again 2026-04-29 PM (current).
Replaces the prior featured-Alliance hero (which was ~620px tall with logo + 4-up benefits + 2 CTAs; dominated the page).
Now: simple navy hub hero matching Communities hub structure. Eyebrow + H1 + tagline. Alliance Foundation strip lives in Section 04.
Roboto Slab + text-transform:none overrides REMOVED. H1 inherits The7 default (Open Sans Condensed UPPERCASE bold). Brings Memberships hub typography in line with all other FSI Elementor pages.

2026-04-29 copy revision (Jonathan): H1 changed from 'The seven memberships that organize this work.' to 'The seven memberships that move this industry forward.' Sub rewritten to name all 7 memberships inline (NMSA, MSEA, Legal League, FORCE, PPEF, AMDC, Five Star Alliance) and reframe as 'serving your profession in the mortgage and housing industries.'

settings.html:
Professional Memberships

The seven memberships that move this industry forward.

Five Star Institute's professional memberships: NMSA, MSEA, Legal League, FORCE, PPEF, AMDC, and Five Star Alliance are the formal organizations serving your profession in the mortgage and housing industries.
